sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45839" key="e)formhtiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐφορμ-ητικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n45839.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">capable of urging on</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.</author> </bibl> Tyr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1487.tlg001:7:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.8</biblScope></bibl>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐξορμ-</ref> </xr> in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:86" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.86</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
